subject: Refactor MC windirver plugin namespace
commit_message:
Refactor MC windirver plugin namespace

Workaround the constraints of ISTIO which prohibit
the usage of _ in the namespace

Change-Id: I04b266ab8fc27bbd9058c7adab21e64543960815
Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-335
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

MC windriver is being killed by the new liveness probe.  Does this need a container tag version update as well?  It hasn't changed from 1.1.2 and you have a new swagger endpoint..Does the v1 endpoint exist in container v1.1.2?


multicloud-multicloud-windriver-5dd7fd6db6-k7zfv   1/2       CrashLoopBackOff   7          27m


 Warning  Unhealthy              17m (x9 over 20m)  kubelet, k8s-1     Liveness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 404
  Normal   Pulled                 17m (x2 over 18m)  kubelet, k8s-1     Container image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/multicloud/openstack-windriver:1.1.2" already present on machine
  Normal   Killing                12m (x5 over 18m)  kubelet, k8s-1     Killing container with id docker://multicloud-windriver:Container failed liveness probe.. Container will be killed and recreated.

Patch Set 1:

> MC windriver is being killed by the new liveness probe.  Does this
 > need a container tag version update as well?  It hasn't changed
 > from 1.1.2 and you have a new swagger endpoint..Does the v1
 > endpoint exist in container v1.1.2?
 > 
 > 
 > multicloud-multicloud-windriver-5dd7fd6db6-k7zfv   1/2      
 > CrashLoopBackOff   7          27m
 > 
 > 
 > Warning  Unhealthy              17m (x9 over 20m)  kubelet, k8s-1  
 >   Liveness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 404
 > Normal   Pulled                 17m (x2 over 18m)  kubelet, k8s-1  
 >   Container image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/multicloud/openstack-windriver:1.1.2"
 > already present on machine
 > Normal   Killing                12m (x5 over 18m)  kubelet, k8s-1  
 >   Killing container with id docker://multicloud-windriver:Container
 > failed liveness probe.. Container will be killed and recreated.

The new endpoint come to alive from 1.2.0-STAGING, and this patch is to fixing the OOM daily healthcheck for ONAP in master branch, I need Gary's help to figure out why the 1.1.2 is involved here.
Uploaded patch set 2.
